title: wolftpm-tss error code table is a diverging subset of wolftpm's
description: wolftpm/src/error.rs has a comprehensive tpm_rc_name() covering all TPM2-spec VER1/FMT1/WARN codes plus wolfTPM internal codes. wolftpm-tss/src/error.rs has a smaller inline match arm with only ~14 entries. These two tables will drift over time — if a new wolfTPM internal code is added to wolftpm's table, it won't appear in wolftpm-tss's Display. Suggested rewrite: expose tpm_rc_name() from wolftpm-sys (or a shared crate) and call it from both places, or have wolftpm-tss::Error::TpmLayer { rc } call back into wolftpm's tpm_rc_name for its Display. The shared tpm_rc_name already lives at the right layer (wolftpm-sys) conceptually.
